patches.hypothesis: Optimized the null check and string comparison to make the method more robust and generalizable.
patches.original_hypothesis: The issue is caused by the usage of the `==` operator to compare strings. This operator checks if the two operands refer to the same object in memory, rather than checking their contents. In this case, the string literals are not interned, so the `==` operator returns false even if the strings have the same content.
